title: Reactive Microservices Platform
description: Led monolith-to-microservices migration using Spring Boot and Spring WebFlux. Handles 10,000+ requests/second with sub-100ms latency. Includes Redis caching, CI/CD with Jenkins and Docker.

title: Provider Center Application
description: End-to-end full-stack provider center built with React.js and Spring Boot at Synchrony/SASS TECH. Improved team productivity by 35% and frontend performance by 30% using React Hooks and Redux.

title: Project Management System
description: Web-based project management system developed during internship at Synchrony. Handled full-stack development including backend, frontend, API integration, and database design end-to-end.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Personal portfolio built with React 19, Spring Boot 3, and MongoDB. Features reactive REST APIs with Spring WebFlux, smooth animations with Framer Motion, and a contact form.
